commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P2] Maintainer review is needed to accept the new built-in provider and security/resource boundary; no narrow automated repair is evident.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain defect was found, but the new provider's credential, TLS, SSH-key, and VM deletion boundary still needs maintainer acceptance. (sha=2d6d6a18ebcb19d6070f151bebb5cdbb08a74daf)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a built-in Linux-only XCP-ng SSH-lease provider with XAPI lifecycle, config/env/flag plumbing, docs, tests, a guarded live-smoke script, and adjacent CLI routing/validation updates.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature PR rather than a bug report. The contributor provided live proof for doctor, mutating smoke, run, stop, and cleanup-list behavior.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainer review is needed to accept the new built-in provider and security/resource boundary; no narrow automated repair is evident.

target.title: feat(provider): add XCP-ng provider
target.body:
## Summary

- Add an XCP-ng provider with VM clone, config-drive, SSH readiness, stop/release, cleanup, and doctor support.
- Add XCP-ng configuration parsing, provider registration, docs, command help references, and changelog coverage.
- Add focused tests for provider config, lifecycle behavior, Xen API client handling, redaction, cloud-init/config-drive content, and cleanup edge cases.

## Related

- Addresses https://github.com/openclaw/crabbox/issues/217
- Follows up on https://github.com/openclaw/crabbox/issues/217#issuecomment-4637370969

## Verification

- `go test -race ./...`

## Notes

- Live XCP-ng smoke coverage is exposed through `scripts/xcpng-live-smoke.sh` and requires local XCP-ng configuration/credentials.
target.author: coygeek

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
